calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar May-21-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances (via ZOOM videoconference):
Atty. Paula Skerston, Esq. specially appearing for the Plaintiff;
No appearance by any other party or counsel.

PLAINTIFF PERSOLVE, LLC A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

The matter is called. The Court notes that this is the second failure to appear by Cassandra Pierce. There being no appearance by Ms. Pierce, the claim of exemption is DENIED.

Brief discussions are held regarding the release of the funds being held. At the conclusion of the discussions, the Court orders the funds being held released to Ms. Skerston's client.

The Court will issue an order.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Court Reporter: Rose Miller, CSR No. 5041, Email: RMillerCSR@gmail.com. (302/RBU)
